programme.title: Premiership Women's Rugby
programme.desc: Action from Saracens v Ealing Trailfinders in the 2026 final.

programme.title: Discovery Golf
programme.desc: A weekly show featuring the latest news from the world of golf.

programme.desc: Ireland v India. Action from the first T20 in the two-match series from Stormont Cricket Ground in Belfast.

programme.title: Fishing: On the Bank
programme.desc: Including coverage of the Southampton Boat Show.

programme.title: Reframe the Game
programme.desc: A woman is uprooted from her country in terrifying circumstances. After a headline-hitting evacuation to the UK, she finds a new home and community in a Yorkshire football club.

programme.title: Reframe the Game
programme.desc: The story of trailblazer Carol Glenn, the first black woman to become a race official in the UK.

programme.title: Formula E: Driver
programme.desc: British driver Dan Ticktum has a point to prove, yet a mounting series of team blunders pushes his temper toward the edge, putting all his momentum in jeopardy.

programme.desc: Aston Villa v Newcastle United.

programme.title: Lions Uncut: Australia 2025
programme.desc: A behind-the-scenes documentary that captures every triumph, heartbreak, and unfiltered moment of the British and Irish Lions' 2025 rugby tour to Australia.

programme.title: Playing for Our Future - Rugby
programme.desc: Asking what the future holds for rugby in the battle against global warming. Reshmin Chowdhury meets people at all levels to discuss how rugby can be a positive force for change.

programme.title: Live: Wimbledon Match Point
programme.desc: A comprehensive wrap-up of the winners and losers from the day's action at Wimbledon.

programme.title: Live: SportsCenter
programme.desc: The latest news, highlights and inside information from every corner of the sports world is presented each day on "SportsCenter," ESPN's first-ever program when the network debuted in September of 1979. The flagship series airs an evening edition and a brand new midnight show each weekday before the stage is cleared for a live "SportsCenter" morning block that emphasizes fast-paced, highlights-dri

programme.title: Live: Pardon the Interruption
programme.desc: The debate is the story in this fast-paced, half-hour series hosted by former Washington Post sportswriters Tony Kornheiser and Michael Wilbon. The pair engage in high-energy discussions, conduct interviews and often argue over topics not even related to sports. Other sports reporters appear as guests and offer opinions on the top stories of the day.

programme.title: Live: SportsCenter
programme.desc: The latest news, highlights and inside information from every corner of the sports world is presented each day on "SportsCenter," ESPN's first-ever program when the network debuted in September of 1979. The flagship series airs an evening edition and a brand new midnight show each weekday before the stage is cleared for a live "SportsCenter" morning block that emphasizes fast-paced, highlights-dri

programme.title: Live: Baseball Tonight
programme.desc: If you're a fan of baseball, then you won't want to miss this show featuring highlights of all the games and updates of ones still in progress. Regularly hosted by Karl Ravech, he's joined by a rotating panel of analysts that includes former players and managers, plus reporters such as Tim Kurkjian and Buster Olney. Other hosts include Adnan Virk and Jon Sciambi.

programme.title: Live: MLB Baseball
programme.desc: From American Family Field in Milwaukee.

programme.title: Live: SportsCenter
programme.desc: The latest news, highlights and inside information from every corner of the sports world is presented each day on "SportsCenter," ESPN's first-ever program when the network debuted in September of 1979. programme.title: UFC Reloaded
programme.desc: A look back at UFC Fight Night in Dublin from October 2015, featuring the enthralling headline flyweight bout between Louis Smolka and Paddy Holohan.

programme.desc: The best bits from TNT Sports over the last week, including exclusive interviews, top action, and more.

programme.title: Ultimate Pool
programme.desc: Action from the Group 3 matches in the Champions League tournament, as four players competed in a series of round-robin matches to earn a place in the Super 8's.

programme.title: AFL
programme.desc: Geelong Cats v Brisbane Lions.

programme.title: Test Cricket Highlights
programme.desc: A look back at West Indies v Sri Lanka in the First Test of the series.

programme.title: The Gallagher PREM
programme.desc: A look back at the best tries of the 2025/26 season.

programme.title: Fishing: On the Bank
programme.desc: Including coverage of the Southampton Boat Show.

programme.title: AFL
programme.desc: Geelong Cats v Brisbane Lions.

programme.title: College Football
programme.desc: Dallas-Fort Worth metroplex schools, the Mustangs (2-1) and Horned Frogs (2-0), renew their rivalry. The programs have combined to average 78 points per game over their last five meetings. TCU leads the series 53-43-7, but fell 66-42 to SMU in 2024.

programme.title: Live: Lacrosse
programme.desc: Lacrosse action from around the world.

programme.title: TrueSouth
programme.desc: John T. Edge travels around the region, introducing viewers to Southern tastemakers, food, culture and history.

programme.title: Live: Lacrosse
programme.desc: Lacrosse action from around the world.

programme.title: TrueSouth
programme.desc: Narvaez welcomes the crew into his world, which revolves around Baseline Road, the Camino Real of Little Rock; he and his brother Raul Narvaez own four businesses in town, including El Super Pollo, a western wear store and two grocery stores.

programme.title: College Football
programme.desc: Elite quarterbacks square off when Sawyer Robertson's Bears visit Josh Hoover's Horned Frogs. Entering Week 8, Robertson and Hoover sat first and second in the nation, respectively, in passing yards and TDs. Baylor slipped past TCU 37-34 in 2024.

programme.title: College Football
programme.desc: The No. 12 Cougars (8-1, 5-1 Big 12) try to bounce back when they host the Horned Frogs (6-3, 3-3). TCU has won five in a row over BYU after a 44-11 result in 2023 in their first meeting since 2011. BYU fell 29-7 at then-No. 8 Texas Tech on Nov. 8.

programme.title: ACC Huddle
programme.desc: ACC Huddle, ACCN's signature football show, airs on Saturday mornings this fall. Host Kelsey Riggs and analysts Eric Mac Lain, EJ Manuel, Mark Richt, and Eddie Royal go on the road to preview the weekend's slate of ACC football games.

programme.title: Lacrosse
programme.desc: Lacrosse action from around the world.

programme.title: Live: Unsportsmanlike with Evan, Canty and Michelle
programme.desc: Start the day off right with Chris Canty, Evan Cohen and Michelle Smallmon providing an energizing and informative way to take on the day. Sports, life and laughter are what it's all about.

programme.title: College Football
programme.desc: The Trojans (9-3) draw the Horned Frogs (8-4) in the Alamo Bowl from San Antonio. TCU's only postseason loss since 2016 came in the 2022 CFP final, a stretch that began with a win in the 2017 Alamo Bowl. TCU beat USC 28-19 in the 1998 Sun Bowl.

programme.title: College Football
programme.desc: Young quarterbacks take center stage as the Mean Green and Cougars meet for the first time. Both teams are 2-0. North Texas freshman Drew Mestemaker and Washington State sophomore Jaxon Potter have combined for nine TD passes and zero interceptions.

programme.title: College Football
programme.desc: The Mean Green seek their first 5-0 start since 1977 as the 1-3 Jaguars pay a visit. Freshman quarterback Drew Mestemaker (UNT) has completed 70.8% of his passes with 10 touchdowns and zero interceptions. North Texas beat South Alabama 52-38 in 2024.

programme.title: College Football
programme.desc: The Bulls visit the Mean Green. South Florida quarterback Byrum Brown has thrown four TD passes in back-to-back games, and ran for a career-high 162 yards in a 54-26 win over Charlotte on Oct. 3. North Texas is 5-0 for the first time since 1959.

programme.title: Live Racing
programme.desc: Today's live racing action from Thirsk, Epsom and Fairyhouse.

programme.desc: Another chance to watch today's racing action from Thirsk and Epsom.

programme.title: MLB Baseball
programme.desc: From Citizens Bank Park in Philadelphia.

programme.title: Live: MLB Baseball
programme.desc: From Citizens Bank Park in Philadelphia.

programme.title: The Varsity With John Ourand
programme.desc: John Ourand and a rotating cast of industry insiders take you inside the executive suites and owners boxes where the decisions that shape the entire sports business are made; you'll hear interviews with players, execs and everyone in between.

programme.title: MLB Baseball
programme.desc: From Citizens Bank Park in Philadelphia.

programme.title: The Card Life
programme.desc: We learn about the hobby and business of sports card collecting.

programme.title: Hobby House
programme.desc: This month, late spring is keeping everyone in the shop busy. Chuck and Audrey spend a full day giving back with the Eagles, Phillies and 76ers. Phillies legend Larry Bowa also discusses some baseball cards from his long career.

programme.title: American Association of Professional Baseball
programme.desc: From Legends Field in Kansas City, Kan.

programme.title: MLB Baseball
programme.desc: From Citizens Bank Park in Philadelphia.

programme.title: Best Mattress Topper Ever!
programme.desc: Back Pain? Hip? Sleep well thanks to this cooling topper!

programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: Paid Programming
programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: Steel City Chronicles
programme.desc: Bob Walk, aka The Whirly Bird, had a Pirates' legacy marked by resilience, versatility, and memorable postseason moments, cementing his place in the team's history both as a player and later as a beloved voice on the air.

programme.title: Live: MLB Baseball
programme.desc: From Citizens Bank Park in Philadelphia.

programme.title: Charlie Moore: No Offense
programme.desc: A trip to Nashville, Tennessee, with a meet and greet with musician and star of America's Got Talent Dave Fenley. Dave talks to Charlie about his career. Charlie and Dave visit Carter's Vintage Guitars. Charlie attends Dave's concert.

programme.title: The Iconic
programme.desc: Stories behind celebrated events, institutions, clubs, players, rivalries and moments in sport.

programme.title: Live: Minor League Baseball
programme.desc: From LECOM Park in Bradenton, Fla.

programme.title: World Class Championship Boxing
programme.desc: From Brooklyn, N.Y.

programme.title: Fight Sports: World Championship Kickboxing
programme.desc: Competitions in kickboxing and Muay Thai.

programme.title: Pure Outdoor
programme.desc: Outdoor sports from all over the world, from freestyle ski jumping to airplane aerobatics.

programme.title: Offroad Odyssey
programme.desc: Friends from season 2 take Alexa crawling through the Sierra Nevada Mountains.

programme.title: World Poker Tour
programme.desc: Professional poker action from a series of international tournaments.

programme.title: Golf at Altitude
programme.desc: Green Valley Ranch Golf Club hosts the Colorado Open Championships and features a full range practice facility in addition to its courses.

programme.title: She's in the Game
programme.desc: Meet the next generation of superstar female athletes around the country as we go behind the scenes to shine the light on them and their interests off the field, along with catching up with the female legends who paved the way for all this growth.

programme.title: Sports Stars of Tomorrow
programme.desc: Profiles of the top rookie, college and high-school talent in sports; current athletes share their experiences, advice and personal impressions of the road to stardom.

programme.title: Altitude Extra
programme.desc: Vic Lombardi sat down with Denver Nuggets legend Dan Issel to discuss his basketball career, his involvement with horse racing and his evaluation of Nikola Jokić.

programme.title: Swing Clinic With Jimmy Hanlin
programme.desc: Golf tips, strategy and review of products.

programme.title: Golfing the World
programme.desc: Highlighting golf courses and private resorts from around the world.

programme.title: Golf Life
programme.desc: Featuring the latest trends, tours of the finest courses and tips from golf experts.

programme.title: A Fishing Story With Ronnie Green
programme.desc: Kris Johnson is a professional fishing guide who not only helps his clients reel in great catches but also shares meaningful lessons from each trip. He takes pride in offering more than just a day on the water-providing inspiration, reflection, and a deeper connection to the creator.

programme.title: Pure Outdoor
programme.desc: Outdoor sports from all over the world, from freestyle ski jumping to airplane aerobatics.

programme.title: Offroad Odyssey
programme.desc: Friends from season 2 take Alexa crawling through the Sierra Nevada Mountains.

programme.title: World Class Championship Boxing
programme.desc: From Brooklyn, N.Y.

programme.title: Fight Sports: World Championship Kickboxing
programme.desc: Competitions in kickboxing and Muay Thai.

programme.title: Ready for a safer shower? Enjoy a one-day bath remodel with Jacuzzi.
programme.desc: Trusted brand Jacuzzi Bath Remodel and interior designer Christina Hall share their secrets on how you can easily and affordably transform your bathroom into a gorgeous custom, safe, stylish space in 1 day! Call for a FREE quote & installation.

programme.title: Tired of Pain? Go Drug-Free
programme.desc: See how a drug-free patch is helping people find relief-without medication.

programme.title: RateEscape: Stop Overpaying For Cellular
programme.desc: Cut up to half the cost of your monthly cell phone bill; same towers, same coverage, but a lot less money; it sounds great but is it too good to be true?; join myth-busting legend Kari Byron as she takes on Big Wireless to save you money.

programme.title: Pain Relief Revealed
programme.desc: Discover the hidden story of OmegaXL with John Walsh. He dives deep into the groundbreaking supplement that promises hope and relief for millions battling joint pain and inflammation.

programme.title: Paid Programming
programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: Ready for a safer shower? Enjoy a one-day bath remodel with Jacuzzi.
programme.desc: Trusted brand Jacuzzi Bath Remodel and interior designer Christina Hall share their secrets on how you can easily and affordably transform your bathroom into a gorgeous custom, safe, stylish space in 1 day! Call for a FREE quote & installation.

programme.title: Major League Fishing
programme.desc: Four teams compete in Elimination Match 2 of the Challenge Cup to advance to the Knockout Rounds. From Port Huron, Mich.

programme.title: Fairways of Life
programme.desc: New York Times's Best Seller and Golf Channel Host Matt Adams provides unforgettable interviews with golf's legends and stars, as well as lively interactive discussions about the game, travel and the latest in golf equipment.

programme.title: Golf at Altitude
programme.desc: Green Valley Ranch Golf Club hosts the Colorado Open Championships and features a full range practice facility in addition to its courses.

programme.title: Sports Stars of Tomorrow
programme.desc: Profiles of the top rookie, college and high-school talent in sports; current athletes share their experiences, advice and personal impressions of the road to stardom.

programme.title: She's in the Game
programme.desc: Meet the next generation of superstar female athletes around the country as we go behind the scenes to shine the light on them and their interests off the field, along with catching up with the female legends who paved the way for all this growth.

programme.title: Pure Outdoor
programme.desc: Outdoor sports from all over the world, from freestyle ski jumping to airplane aerobatics.

programme.title: Offroad Odyssey
programme.desc: Friends from season 2 take Alexa crawling through the Sierra Nevada Mountains.

programme.title: Swing Clinic With Jimmy Hanlin
programme.desc: Golf tips, strategy and review of products.

programme.title: Golfing the World
programme.desc: Highlighting golf courses and private resorts from around the world.

programme.title: The Short List
programme.desc: The sports countdown, featuring iconic themes focused upon the memorable moments and individuals in sports; the 10 memorable debuts, the 10 revered innovators, the comebacks of all time and much more.

programme.title: Invincible
programme.desc: Periods of unrivaled domination in sport, including chapters from sport's greatest careers and iconic dynasties.

programme.title: The Iconic
programme.desc: Stories behind celebrated events, institutions, clubs, players, rivalries and moments in sport.

programme.title: Live Men's 1st T20: Eng v Ind
programme.desc: India's white-ball tour of England gets underway with the opening T20I in a five-match series at the Riverside Ground in Chester-le-Street.

programme.title: World Cup Report
programme.desc: A comprehensive round-up of all the day's World Cup news.

programme.title: Live Major League Cricket
programme.desc: Los Angeles Knight Riders play Washington Freedom in a 20-over contest from Major League Cricket.

programme.title: World Cup Report
programme.desc: A comprehensive round-up of all the day's World Cup news.

programme.title: World Cup Breakfast
programme.desc: A round-up of the all the breaking news stories from the 2026 FIFA World Cup, with live analysis and comment plus interviews with the headline makers.

programme.title: World Cup Matchday
programme.desc: Look ahead to the evening's FIFA World Cup action, with expert opinion, live discussion and analysis of the biggest news stories.

programme.title: Live DP World Tour Golf
programme.desc: The opening round of the BMW International Open, taking place at Golfclub München Eichenried in Munich. England's Dan Brown captured his second DP World Tour title at this event last year.

programme.title: World Cup Matchday
programme.desc: Look ahead to the evening's FIFA World Cup action, with expert opinion, live discussion and analysis of the biggest news stories.

programme.title: Live ICC WT20 WC SF2: ENG v SA
programme.desc: Winning all five of their group games, England meet South Africa in the semi-finals of a home ICC Women's T20 World Cup. South Africa have finished runners-up in the last two editions.

programme.title: Live PGA Tour Golf
programme.desc: Day one of the PGA Tour's John Deere Classic, taking place at TPC Deere Run in Illinois. Brian Campbell overcame Emiliano Grillo in a playoff for last year's win.

programme.title: Misplays of the Month
programme.desc: A look at the month's top bloopers.

programme.title: Gotta See It
programme.desc: Must-see moments from the world of sports.

programme.title: World Poker Tour
programme.desc: Professional poker action from a series of international tournaments.

programme.title: World Poker Tour
programme.desc: A $2 million prize pool builds in Oklahoma and a final table is ready to get started.

programme.title: Plays of the Month - Highlights
programme.desc: Highlighting the past month's best in daily sports moments.

programme.title: MLB Plays of the Week
programme.desc: A look at the top plays and moments from the past week in baseball.

programme.title: MLB Baseball
programme.desc: From Rogers Centre in Toronto.

programme.title: Blue Jays in 30
programme.desc: From July 1, 2026.

programme.title: World Poker Tour
programme.desc: Professional poker action from a series of international tournaments.

programme.title: Misplays of the Month
programme.desc: A look at the month's top bloopers.

programme.title: MLB Plays of the Week
programme.desc: A look at the top plays and moments from the past week in baseball.

programme.title: Plays of the Month - Countdown
programme.desc: Highlighting the past month's best in daily sports moments.

programme.title: Gotta See It
programme.desc: Must-see moments from the world of sports.

programme.title: High Stakes Poker
programme.desc: Tom Dwan wins two pots before Krish Menon joins in on the winning ways; Eric Persson's luck does a reversal as he loses a pot to newcomer John Andress before he puts Garrett Adelstein in a very uncomfortable spot on the river with a set.

programme.title: Stompin' groundz
programme.desc: A hunting show for EVERYONE! Come enjoy our fast-paced and upbeat hunting show. Follow along with hosts Brandon Jennings, Sean Lundy, and John O'Dell as we travel all over the globe hunting multiple species, attempt to educate and entertain our viewers, and focus on the one thing that matters most.... Family.

programme.title: Hollywood Weapons
programme.desc: A murderer tries to kill his final victim as the car they occupy slowly sinks to the bottom of a lake; the only way to save the victim is to rescue her as the car continues to sink; test firing multiple handguns underwater.

programme.title: Art of Wild
programme.desc: Art of wild is a film series that aims to tell stories about the wild in the most cinematic way possible. To tell the best stories we travel to the most incredible places. It is in the wild places where most won't go that the human spirit is fed. Only a hunter knows what it's like to wake up with the woods, or hear a bull bugle in the graylight, these moments are what make up the beauty of the wil

programme.title: Chasing the 29
programme.desc: Follow Chase on a coastal brown bear hunt with multiple twists and turns.

programme.title: The Most Wanted List
programme.desc: This isn't a highlight reel-it's the real deal. The Most Wanted List takes you into raw, unpredictable hunts where nothing goes as planned and every opportunity is earned. Misses, miles, and moments that matter... this is what chasing the most wanted is all about.

programme.title: Winchester Deadly Passion
programme.desc: Melissa travels the globe going head-to-head with various animals.

programme.title: MeatEater
programme.desc: In Northwest Arkansas, Steven travels on mule back into the Ozarks with Clay Newcomb and Janis Putelis to hunt squirrels by day and raccoons by night.

programme.title: MeatEater
programme.desc: The targets abound when Steven hunts feral goats on the Big Island of Hawaii, then picks up a rod to fish for wahoo and gray snapper offshore.

programme.title: Steve's Outdoor Adventures
programme.desc: Steve West hunts coastal Alaska with his CVA muzzleloader for mountain goats.

programme.title: Elk Camp
programme.desc: Renowned elk caller and professional guide Steve Chappell guides his clients on up close, bugling elk hunts in Arizona and Colorado. Steve's calling skills and capacity for understanding elk behavior are on display each week.

programme.title: Legends of the Fall
programme.desc: Legends of the Fall is produced with truly die-hard deer hunters in mind. Legends of the Fall chronicles the high-energy hunts and behind-the-scenes action of a dedicated crew of passionate hunters. While the show spotlights a dynamic variety of adrenaline-pumping whitetail bow hunts across North America, it also offers a mix of other big game adventures. Each episode details the lives of all clan

programme.title: Whitetail Properties
programme.desc: Montana Land Specialist Jerrod Meyer chases elk on a full moon during pre-rut. Riding the struggle bus all the way down the mountain.

programme.title: The Woodsman
programme.desc: Join BVO Prostaffers Mark Barber, Easton Maxfield, and AJ Simpson as they pursue mature whitetail bucks across the country.

programme.title: Bowhunter TV
programme.desc: Danny Farris and his son Casey head deep into Saskatchewan's rugged bear country with outfitter Rob Nye for an unforgettable hunt. Amid the vast northern wilderness, Casey gets the chance to take his first black bear.

programme.title: Chasing the 29
programme.desc: Follow Chase on a coastal brown bear hunt with multiple twists and turns.

programme.title: Wild Upland
programme.desc: Kali Parmley heads into the Colorado alpine in search of ptarmigan.

programme.title: MeatEater
programme.desc: In Northwest Arkansas, Steven travels on mule back into the Ozarks with Clay Newcomb and Janis Putelis to hunt squirrels by day and raccoons by night.

programme.title: MeatEater
programme.desc: The targets abound when Steven hunts feral goats on the Big Island of Hawaii, then picks up a rod to fish for wahoo and gray snapper offshore.

programme.title: Legends of the Fall
programme.desc: Legends of the Fall is produced with truly die-hard deer hunters in mind. Legends of the Fall chronicles the high-energy hunts and behind-the-scenes action of a dedicated crew of passionate hunters. While the show spotlights a dynamic variety of adrenaline-pumping whitetail bow hunts across North America, it also offers a mix of other big game adventures. Each episode details the lives of all clan

programme.title: Whitetail Properties
programme.desc: Montana Land Specialist Jerrod Meyer chases elk on a full moon during pre-rut. Riding the struggle bus all the way down the mountain.

programme.title: The Woodsman
programme.desc: Join BVO Prostaffers Mark Barber, Easton Maxfield, and AJ Simpson as they pursue mature whitetail bucks across the country.

programme.title: Bowhunter TV
programme.desc: Danny Farris and his son Casey head deep into Saskatchewan's rugged bear country with outfitter Rob Nye for an unforgettable hunt. Amid the vast northern wilderness, Casey gets the chance to take his first black bear.

programme.title: Rooster Tales
programme.desc: Rooster Tales takes viewers on exciting upland bird hunting adventures across North America in search of wild birds in wild places. Host, Travis Frank, shares stories from the field about passionate bird hunters, bird dogs, habitat conservation, and DIY bird hunts on public land.

programme.title: Hunter
programme.desc: HUNTER® is an exciting new series being produced by Hunter Brand Media and hosted by Dave Poteat, that explores the different ways people use their natural hunter element. The first season is rooted in good ole North American big game hunting which is where Host, Dave Poteat's roots run the deepest. But as the series grows in the years to come, we will venture out from the comforts of the Whitetai

programme.title: Greg McHale's Wild Yukon
programme.desc: Greg is deep in the Yukon mountains on a sheep hunt with Yukon Premier, Ranj Pillai, when an urgent call pulls him out of the field. With his dad Brent rushed to the hospital, Greg leaves the hunt behind and heads home. What started as another season in the wild quickly turns into something far more personal.

programme.title: Hollywood Weapons
programme.desc: A murderer tries to kill his final victim as the car they occupy slowly sinks to the bottom of a lake; the only way to save the victim is to rescue her as the car continues to sink; test firing multiple handguns underwater.

programme.title: Chasing the 29
programme.desc: On this episode of ChasingThe29, we hunt the rivers and fields of Montana in pursuit of ducks and geese, experiencing fast action, changing conditions, and unforgettable days in the flyway.

programme.title: The Most Wanted List
programme.desc: This isn't a highlight reel-it's the real deal. The Most Wanted List takes you into raw, unpredictable hunts where nothing goes as planned and every opportunity is earned. Misses, miles, and moments that matter... this is what chasing the most wanted is all about.

programme.title: Roger Raglin Outdoors
programme.desc: Join host Roger Raglin for one exciting whitetail adventure after another. Roger Raglin Outdoors features all big game but is predominantly whitetail hunting utilizing a variety of hunting methods: bow, rifle and black powder. As a true outdoorsman and an exceptional big game hunter, Roger shares a lifetime of tricks and techniques to help you in your quest for big game.

programme.title: Bowhunter TV
programme.desc: Danny Farris and his son Casey head deep into Saskatchewan's rugged bear country with outfitter Rob Nye for an unforgettable hunt. Amid the vast northern wilderness, Casey gets the chance to take his first black bear.

programme.title: Winchester & Drury's Natural Born
programme.desc: Experience the ultimate connection between man and nature with Winchester and Drury Outdoors Natural Born! Whether you love fired-up gobblers, monster whitetails, or Western adventure, Natural Born immerses you in the beauty of nature and the raw authenticity of the hunt. We were born for this!

programme.title: Dropped: Project Origin
programme.desc: Alaska doesn't ask people to leave, she tells them to leave.

programme.title: Hornady's Dark and Dangerous
programme.desc: Three safaris begin in Zimbabwe as Harm Gross starts a lion and leopard hunt in Dande, Buzz Arthur tracks elephant, and Joe Theilen heads into buffalo country.

programme.title: Chasing the 29
programme.desc: Follow Chase on a coastal brown bear hunt with multiple twists and turns.

programme.title: Trijicon's World of Sports Afield
programme.desc: We take the viewer inside the pages of Sports Afield Magazine.

programme.title: Duck Camp Dinners
programme.desc: Chef and the crew head out to west Louisiana to hunt gators and early teal.

programme.title: RNT-V
programme.desc: RNT-V is based around the RNT Call Shop in Stuttgart, Arkansas--from chasing ducks and geese over fine retrievers in different parts of the country to uncovering the history of an old time call maker. Hosted by World Champions who are all about the hunt!

programme.title: Heartland Waterfowl
programme.desc: The launch of a season 13 begins in North Dakota for early season honkers in late August.

programme.title: Bill Dance Saltwater
programme.desc: We're casting out a look ahead to all our new shows for 2026!

programme.title: Reel Animals
programme.desc: Captain Mike Anderson and Captain Ozzie Lessinger take advantage of the springtime bite at South Seas Island Resort.

programme.title: The Hunt for Monster Bass
programme.desc: Ott DeFoe fishes heavy pads and grass mats in northern Florida; follow his game plan to catch large bass.

programme.title: Wild Upland
programme.desc: Kali Parmley heads into the Colorado alpine in search of ptarmigan.

programme.title: Small Town Hunting
programme.desc: Kentucky is always a good place to start the year with one of the earliest whitetail seasons opening in the country, not to mention good friends and dove hunting.

programme.title: Ranch America
programme.desc: River Klass, a rancher and restaurateur, shows how American beef gets to the dinner table.

programme.title: Huntworx
programme.desc: HuntWorx is a new show based around the ideology of the three major principles that aid in consistently harvesting mature animals. This plan, prep and pursue model has stood the test of time and continues to pay dividends for our cast year in and year out. With a combined over 100 years of dedicated hunting experience, Greg Glesinger, Kasey Morgan, Matt Dye, Adam Keith, and Max Mongrello wish to n

programme.title: Hornady's Dark and Dangerous
programme.desc: Three safaris begin in Zimbabwe as Harm Gross starts a lion and leopard hunt in Dande, Buzz Arthur tracks elephant, and Joe Theilen heads into buffalo country.

programme.title: Handguns
programme.desc: In a self-defense scenario, purposeful movement makes you a harder target.

programme.title: Hollywood Weapons
programme.desc: A murderer tries to kill his final victim as the car they occupy slowly sinks to the bottom of a lake; the only way to save the victim is to rescue her as the car continues to sink; test firing multiple handguns underwater.

programme.title: The Wild Outdoors
programme.desc: Opening Nebraska turkey season.

programme.title: Elk Camp
programme.desc: Renowned elk caller and professional guide Steve Chappell guides his clients on up close, bugling elk hunts in Arizona and Colorado. Steve's calling skills and capacity for understanding elk behavior are on display each week.

programme.title: Greg McHale's Wild Yukon
programme.desc: Greg is deep in the Yukon mountains on a sheep hunt with Yukon Premier, Ranj Pillai, when an urgent call pulls him out of the field. With his dad Brent rushed to the hospital, Greg leaves the hunt behind and heads home. What started as another season in the wild quickly turns into something far more personal.

programme.title: Steve's Outdoor Adventures
programme.desc: Steve West hunts coastal Alaska with his CVA muzzleloader for mountain goats.

programme.title: The Western Hunter
programme.desc: Mark Denham and his dad, Chris, both have antelope tags in Wyoming.

programme.title: Into High Country
programme.desc: Into High Country seeks to capture the most compelling and wide array of authentic hunting adventures from the most epic landscapes the Western U.S. and North America have to offer. Featured is a wide array of bow and rifle hunts for big game such as elk, mule deer, black bear, moose, pronghorn, and many more incredible and fascinating wild animal species. Our goal is to reflect the connection bet

programme.title: MeatEater
programme.desc: Spear-fishing champion and chef Kim Werner hosts Steven and Cal on a dive off the Kona coast of Hawaii that results in a feast of seafood delicacies.

programme.title: MeatEater
programme.desc: Biologist and conservationist Robert Abernethy guides Steven on a successful wild turkey hunt in the challenging swamps of South Carolina.

programme.title: Pigman: The Series
programme.desc: Brian Pigman Quaca is a true-blue original—an unapologetic, high-energy host with a larger-than-life personality that has redefined outdoor television. With an unrelenting passion for the chase, Pigman takes on the world's toughest hunts, using any legal means necessary to put game on the ground. While his reputation was built on hardcore hog hunting, don't be mistaken-his skills extend far beyond

programme.title: Fishing the Midwest

programme.title: Angling Edge Adventures
programme.desc: Walleyes at Slate Falls Outposts.

programme.title: Facts of Fishing
programme.desc: Dave finds a pack of small mouth bass in a river mouth at La Reserve Beauchene.

programme.title: Fishing 411
programme.desc: Trolling spoons for Lake Ontario trophy brown trout.

programme.title: Hook the Future
programme.desc: Brian & Dario land Blue Marlin, Striped Marlin & Mahi on an epic trip with Fishing Nosara, Costa Rica.

programme.title: National Walleye Tour
programme.desc: National Walleye Tour kicks off an exciting 13th season at Lake Sharpe in Pierre, South Dakota with lots of the top Pros & Co-Anglers!

programme.title: Reel Animals
programme.desc: Capt. Mike Anderson and Capt. Ryan Rickard keep track of the catch during an epic day in Steinhatchee, FL.

programme.title: Larry Smith Outdoors
programme.desc: Larry & Jeff Van Remortel crush northern Wisconsin walleye, crappies and a surprise musky!

programme.title: Buccaneers and Bones
programme.desc: The turquoise flats surrounding Deep Water Cay, Bahamas, are the backdrop for the sixth season of "Buccaneers & Bones"; good times, with Tom Brokaw, Huey Lewis, Yvon Chouinard and legendary angler Lefty Kreh.

programme.title: Bill Dance Saltwater
programme.desc: There's more to fishin' than just catchin'. As Bill's old friend Smokin' Joe Frazier once told him, "The fun is in the fight both in the ring and in fishin'.".

programme.title: Bill Dance Outdoors
programme.desc: Bill highlights the importance of asking questions and provides answers to viewers on a variety of topics.

programme.title: Fishing With Roland Martin
programme.desc: Roland goes to Okeechobee in a big boat for the opening, then to a canal bank in the Everglades, and finally in a canoe; taking a bunch of bass on a popper; some of them are big.

programme.title: Jimmy Houston Outdoors
programme.desc: Jimmy goes fishing in Oklahoma and Texas.

programme.title: Lake Commandos
programme.desc: Mark Courts and Chad Koel discuss the future of Lake Commandos while catching trophy largemouth bass.

programme.title: Bill Dance Outdoors
programme.desc: Bill highlights the importance of asking questions and provides answers to viewers on a variety of topics.

programme.title: Fishing With Roland Martin
programme.desc: Roland goes to Okeechobee in a big boat for the opening, then to a canal bank in the Everglades, and finally in a canoe; taking a bunch of bass on a popper; some of them are big.

programme.title: Jimmy Houston Outdoors
programme.desc: Jimmy goes fishing in Oklahoma and Texas.

programme.title: Lake Commandos
programme.desc: Mark Courts and Chad Koel discuss the future of Lake Commandos while catching trophy largemouth bass.

programme.title: Reel Animals
programme.desc: Capt. Mike Anderson and Capt. Ryan Rickard keep track of the catch during an epic day in Steinhatchee, FL.

programme.title: Larry Smith Outdoors
programme.desc: Larry & Jeff Van Remortel crush northern Wisconsin walleye, crappies and a surprise musky!

programme.title: Buccaneers and Bones
programme.desc: The turquoise flats surrounding Deep Water Cay, Bahamas, are the backdrop for the sixth season of "Buccaneers & Bones"; good times, with Tom Brokaw, Huey Lewis, Yvon Chouinard and legendary angler Lefty Kreh.

programme.title: Bill Dance Saltwater
programme.desc: There's more to fishin' than just catchin'. As Bill's old friend Smokin' Joe Frazier once told him, "The fun is in the fight both in the ring and in fishin'.".

programme.title: Bill Dance Outdoors
programme.desc: Bill highlights the importance of asking questions and provides answers to viewers on a variety of topics.

programme.title: Fishing With Roland Martin
programme.desc: Roland goes to Okeechobee in a big boat for the opening, then to a canal bank in the Everglades, and finally in a canoe; taking a bunch of bass on a popper; some of them are big.

programme.title: Jimmy Houston Outdoors
programme.desc: Jimmy goes fishing in Oklahoma and Texas.

programme.title: Lake Commandos
programme.desc: Mark Courts and Chad Koel discuss the future of Lake Commandos while catching trophy largemouth bass.

programme.title: Reel Animals
programme.desc: Capt. Mike Anderson and Capt. Ryan Rickard keep track of the catch during an epic day in Steinhatchee, FL.

programme.title: Larry Smith Outdoors
programme.desc: Larry & Jeff Van Remortel crush northern Wisconsin walleye, crappies and a surprise musky!

programme.title: Buccaneers and Bones
programme.desc: The turquoise flats surrounding Deep Water Cay, Bahamas, are the backdrop for the sixth season of "Buccaneers & Bones"; good times, with Tom Brokaw, Huey Lewis, Yvon Chouinard and legendary angler Lefty Kreh.

programme.title: Bill Dance Saltwater
programme.desc: There's more to fishin' than just catchin'. As Bill's old friend Smokin' Joe Frazier once told him, "The fun is in the fight both in the ring and in fishin'.".

programme.title: Bill Dance Outdoors
programme.desc: Bill highlights the importance of asking questions and provides answers to viewers on a variety of topics.

programme.title: Fishing With Roland Martin
programme.desc: Roland goes to Okeechobee in a big boat for the opening, then to a canal bank in the Everglades, and finally in a canoe; taking a bunch of bass on a popper; some of them are big.

programme.title: Jimmy Houston Outdoors
programme.desc: Jimmy goes fishing in Oklahoma and Texas.

programme.title: Lake Commandos
programme.desc: Mark Courts and Chad Koel discuss the future of Lake Commandos while catching trophy largemouth bass.

programme.title: Livin' the Dream With Captain Jimmy Nelson
programme.desc: Livin' the Dream follows Captain Jimmy Nelson and his wife Luiza as they travel and fish in exotic locales.

programme.title: George Poveromo's World of Saltwater Fishing
programme.desc: George Poveromo fishes Key West's Gulf wrecks.

programme.title: Saltwater Underground With Nick Honachefsky
programme.desc: Saltwater Underground with Nick Honachefsky explores the world's finest fishing destinations and the subculture scene of salty characters that come along with it. Each episode unfolds with a boots on the ground local mentality, experiencing the indigenous fishing opportunity at each destination but also focusing on getting in deep with the unique cuisine, local bars and humor of colorful character

programme.title: Unfathomed
programme.desc: Capt. George Gozdz packs up for a week of exploration into Bahamian waters.

programme.title: The Fish Guyz
programme.desc: The guys head down the road to Key West to fish with Capt. Troy; George and Lain have fun with liquid nitrogen at the Wicked Lick ice cream shop; chef Cat prepares a lemon pepper fish recipe submitted by fan Tyler Buchman.
